summary: node-app-doctor exfiltrates host system information to hardcoded external endpoint
details: The package's collect.js gathers host identifiers (os.hostname(), os.homedir()) and filesystem/system probe results via child_process and fs.existsSync calls, then POSTs the collected data to a hardcoded external endpoint at http://aab.sportsontheweb.net. The destination is unrelated to any legitimate app-doctoring functionality, the transport is plaintext HTTP, and the URL is hardcoded in the module body rather than configurable. The shape (os/child_process/fs reads + http(s) module + hardcoded non-publisher domain + POST of host details) is a system-information exfiltration beacon.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
